'''hapanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeawant|zeawant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeawant|zeawant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hapanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæpængæth|hæpængæth]] || [[word:hæpængæj|hæpængæj]] || [[word:hæpængæsh|hæpængæsh]] || [[word:hæpængæ|hæpængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hapapangath|hapapangath]] || [[word:hapapangaj|hapapangaj]] || [[word:hapapangash|hapapangash]] || [[word:hapapanga|hapapanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hapangath|hapangath]] || [[word:hapangaj|hapangaj]] || [[word:hapangash|hapangash]] || [[word:hapanga|hapanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hapafngafth|hapafngafth]] || [[word:hapafngafj|hapafngafj]] || [[word:hapafngafsh|hapafngafsh]] || [[word:hapafngaf|hapafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hapangatha|hapangatha]] || [[word:hapangaja|hapangaja]] || [[word:hapangasha|hapangasha]] || [[word:hapangaka|hapangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hapangath|hapangath]] || [[word:hapangaj|hapangaj]] || [[word:hapangash|hapangash]] || [[word:hapanga|hapanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hapangathal|hapangathal]] || [[word:hapangajal|hapangajal]] || [[word:hapangashal|hapangashal]] || [[word:hapangakal|hapangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hapangaathatha|hapangaathatha]] || [[word:hapangaajaja|hapangaajaja]] || [[word:hapangaashasha|hapangaashasha]] || [[word:hapangaaka|hapangaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hapangathan|hapangathan]] || [[word:hapangajan|hapangajan]] || [[word:hapangashan|hapangashan]] || [[word:hapangakan|hapangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hapangathaoro|hapangathaoro]] || [[word:hapangajaoro|hapangajaoro]] || [[word:hapangashaoro|hapangashaoro]] || [[word:hapangakaoro|hapangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
